text: Research and document WebGL rendering architecture

status.comment: Completed comprehensive architecture document in WEBGL_RENDERING_ARCHITECTURE.md. Covers: system layers, component design (renderer, spatial tree, node/arrow/text renderers, buffers, interaction), data flow, performance targets (60fps with 10k+ nodes), 5-phase implementation plan, technology comparison (recommends raw WebGL), risk mitigation, and code structure. Ready for implementation.
